title: Extraction and Spectrophotometric Determination of  Rhodium with Ethyl-α-isonitrosoacetoacetate
author: M. R. PATIL
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Inorganic Chemistry Laboratory, The Institute of Science,15, Madam Cama Road, Bombay-400 032, India. 

  Manuscript received 30 May 1978, accepted 27 April 1979  

 A method is described for spectrophotometric determination of microgram quantities of Rh after extraction with ethyl-ҩ-isonitrosoacetoacetate (HEINA) into methyl ethyl ketone. With 50 Ag of Rh, the average of 10 determinations is 50.2  µ g which varies between 47.7  µ g and 52.7  µg  at 95% confidence limit. The extracted species contains Rh and HEINA in the ratio of 1:2. It has been shown that HEINA can be employed for simultaneous determination of Rh, Ru and Pd by extractive spectro­photometric method.
